home.tagline: Dating for Mongolian communities in LA and beyond — real accounts, mutual matches, and safe reporting.

register.title: Create account
register.subtitle: Must be 18+. Default location starts in the Los Angeles metro.
register.verifyEmailDev: Account created. You can sign in now — email verification is skipped in this local demo.

onboarding.title: Your profile
onboarding.legalNote: Not legal advice. Confirm immigration questions with a licensed attorney.
onboarding.savedMsg: Profile saved. Add a photo below, then open discovery.
onboarding.photoFail: Could not read that image — try another file.

sponsorship.not_applicable: Not in a position to sponsor
sponsorship.prefer_not_say: Prefer not to say on profile

discover.title: Discover near LA
discover.subtitle: Grid view · mutual match opens chat (stored in this browser only).

guidelines.title: Community guidelines
guidelines.body: Be respectful. No harassment, scams, or hate. Report concerns. Moderation may suspend accounts that endanger the community. Immigration paperwork discussions must stay lawful and honest; this app does not provide legal advice.

data-export.title: Data export
data-export.body: In this local demo, all data lives in your browser storage. Clear site data or use another browser profile to reset.

landing.heroEyebrow: Mongolia, Inner Mongolia, diaspora & mixed heritage
landing.heroHeadline: Finally find Mongolians near you—or across the world
landing.heroHeadlineMn: Дэлхий даяарх монгол түмэнтэй түүнээс ойрхон байдлаар танилцана уу
landing.heroLede: It's oddly hard to bump into other Mongolians even in big cities. Uchral is for ethnic Mongolians and Mongolian-related identities—whether you're Khalkha, Southern Mongol / Inner Mongolian, Buryat / Oirat / Kalmyk ties, mixed heritage, or raised in the diaspora—and want relationships with people who get that background.
landing.communityIntro: The app is intentionally narrow: community trust matters. Profiles are expected to reflect Mongolian or closely related heritage (including mixed families). Moderation and verification would enforce those norms in a shipping product—this demo is only a local preview.
landing.communityBullet1: Citizens and residents of Mongolia; Mongolian passport holders abroad
landing.communityBullet2: Southern / Inner Mongolian communities and related regional identities
landing.communityBullet3: Buryat, Oirat, Kalmyk, and other Mongolic heritage groups (self-described)
landing.communityBullet4: Mixed-heritage Mongolians and people raised in Mongolian families worldwide
landing.problemIntro: Dating apps are huge—but filters can't search for "understands my folks," "will visit the aunts with me," or "speaks the language I grew up with." Distance makes it worse: you might be one of a handful of Mongolians in your city. We foreground location on every profile so you can see where someone actually lives (or is based long term) before you invest emotion.
landing.paperworkTitle: Paperwork & sponsorship—up front, not as a surprise
landing.paperworkIntro: For many people, marriage isn't only romantic—it's also a practical immigration conversation. The prototype asks people to self-report whether they're open to spouse or partner paperwork down the road (including "not in a position to sponsor," "prefer to discuss later," or "prefer not to say publicly"). Nothing here is verified by a lawyer; it's a conversation starter so you're not discovering deal-breakers after months of chatting.
landing.paperworkLegal: Uchral does not provide immigration advice. Laws differ by country and change often. Always confirm serious plans with a licensed attorney in the relevant jurisdiction.
landing.featuresTitle: What you'd expect from a modern dating app
landing.featuresIntro: The interactive demo mixes patterns people already know—so the product feels familiar even though the community is specific.
landing.feature1: Swipe & grid — quick passes or browse everyone in filters
landing.feature2: Rich profiles — prompts, lifestyle, interests (Hinge-style depth)
landing.feature3: Filters — age, heritage keywords, relationship intent, sponsorship stance
landing.feature4: Likes & super likes — stand-out signal (demo toasts)
landing.feature5: Matches & chat — threads with read receipts (mock)
landing.feature6: Safety hooks — block / report entry point on each thread
landing.feature7: Premium ideas — rewind, boost, travel mode (listed under My profile)
landing.feature8: Verification badge — placeholder for photo / ID pipeline
landing.prototypeIntro: Data is fake; likes and chats save only in your browser. Use it to feel the flow: location and sponsorship labels are on every card before you match.
landing.waitlistIntro: Leave your email for product updates. Signups are securely stored on our server.
landing.waitlistFormSubtitle: We'll reach out when invites open.
landing.waitlistSuccess: Thanks — your waitlist entry was saved.
landing.waitlistDuplicate: That email is already on the list.
landing.waitlistTextError: Country and city can contain letters and numbers only.
landing.waitlistServerError: We couldn't save your entry right now. Please try again.
landing.waitlistDevProxyHint: Local dev has no /api server. Add VITE_DEV_API_ORIGIN=https://uchral.net to .env.development.local (then restart npm run dev), or run vercel dev.
landing.visualsTitle: From the steppe to the city
landing.visualsIntro: Steppe-inspired decorative motifs, interlocking rings as a marriage symbol, and illustrative photos: Mongolian landscapes, two people on their phones (faces not shown), traditional dress on grassland, a modern couple abroad, wedding bands, Paris, and views of Ulaanbaatar.
landing.visualsCredit: Photos are stock images from Unsplash contributors (free to use). Illustrative only — not app members.
landing.visualAlt1: Mongolian steppe with grazing herd, traditional gers, and snow-capped mountain peaks
landing.visualAlt3: Two people holding smartphones — faces not shown, staying in touch by phone (illustrative stock photo)
landing.visualAlt4: Person in traditional Mongolian dress on grassland
landing.visualAlt5: Couple together in a modern city abroad
landing.visualAlt6: Wedding rings — symbolic of marriage and commitment
landing.visualAlt7: Paris cityscape with the Eiffel Tower (illustrative stock photo)
landing.visualAlt8: Aerial view of Ulaanbaatar with mountains behind the city
landing.visualAlt9: Ulaanbaatar seen from a high viewpoint
landing.siteFooter: Uchral — local prototype. Not a live dating service.
